sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented for this shmup title

special_mechanics.name: Player Aircraft Selection
special_mechanics.description: Player chooses one of three Silver Hawk variants at start: Green (Darius original), Blue (Darius II), or Red (new prototype). No documented physics differences between variants.

special_mechanics.name: Shot System
special_mechanics.description: Default Y button for shots. Pressing both Y and B simultaneously powers down shots one level. Shot power lost on ship destruction until power-ups collected.

special_mechanics.name: Bomb / Side Laser System
special_mechanics.description: B button for bombs by default. R button switches between bombs and side laser guns. No documented physics parameters.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative) - Darius Force is a horizontal scrolling shooter with no documented movement physics parameters in available sources. Game focuses on aircraft selection, weapon upgrades, and navigation rather than character movement mechanics. Wikipedia source provides gameplay overview but no physics data. TCRF source not usable due to access restrictions.
